center.name: 加萊拉港
center.summary: 加萊拉港是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Mindoro hornbill、Mindoro cuckooshrike，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Dynamite blasting for marble is an additional threat to forest at Puerto Galera Occurs in a few protected areas in the Dubduban Watershed in Tablas, Mount Halcon, Mounts Iglit–Baco Natural Park, Mount Calavite and the Siburan Forest Reserve but actual protection and enforcement from illegal logging and hunting are lax

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Conservation actions proposed include more surveys in areas where they have been reported to better understand the population, create formal protection in other sites where they are found in Malpalon, Puerto Galera and Manamlay Lake
